commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a runtime model override option to `session_status`, threads the active provider/model from OpenClaw tools, covers current vs explicit session lookups, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: `heartbeat.model` is resolved into the active runtime model, but current main's `session_status` display path only sees the session entry/configured model. I did not run an end-to-end heartbeat because this sweep is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane: this PR already contains the focused source/test/docs change, so the next step is normal maintainer review and CI rather than a separate ClawSweeper fix PR.
